stories: US labor stays tight: initial jobless claims drop to 202k (near 2-year low)
Rates reprice higher: US 10-year yield pushes up to ~4.38%
Energy shock intensifies: Hormuz traffic “largely ceases,” oil whipsaws (Brent ~106, WTI ~103)
US equity tone: futures pull back as “war + oil” dominates (but VIX < ~25)
ECB message: inflation still too high—~2.6% projected for 2026, easing stays “data-dependent”
UK rates: gilts sell off despite Bailey warning markets are “getting ahead” on hikes
Capital markets stress test: the ~$3T AI data-center build-out runs into tighter funding conditions
Crypto security shock: Drift Protocol hit by reported ~$285M exploit (Solana DeFi risk-off)
Crypto flows: “Bitcoin treasury boom” unwinds—public companies and Bhutan selling adds spot supply
Wildcard: SpaceX confidentially files for IPO; valuation talk >$1.75T would reset IPO/risk appetite
